mapper.select: SELECT id, todo, detail, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, is_completed AS isCompleted, due_date AS dueDate, delete_flag AS deleteFlag FROM todos WHERE delete_flag = 0

SELECT id, todo, detail, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, is_completed AS isCompleted, due_date AS dueDate, delete_flag AS deleteFlag FROM todos
WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO todos ( todo, detail, created_at, updated_at, is_completed, due_date, delete_flag )
VALUES ( #{todo}, #{detail}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, false, #{dueDate}, 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE todos
SET todo = #{todo}, detail = #{detail}, is_completed = #{isCompleted}, due_date = #{dueDate}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT id, todo, detail, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, is_completed AS isCompleted, due_date AS dueDate, delete_flag AS deleteFlag
FROM todos
WHERE todo LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND delete_flag = 0

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM todos
WHERE is_completed = true AND delete_flag = 0

SELECT id, todo, detail, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, is_completed AS isCompleted, due_date AS dueDate, delete_flag AS deleteFlag
FROM todos
WHERE todo = #{todo} AND is_completed = false AND delete_flag = 0
LIMIT 1

SELECT id, todo, detail, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, is_completed AS isCompleted, due_date AS dueDate, category AS category, delete_flag AS deleteFlag
FROM todos
WHERE delete_flag = 0
AND todo LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND category = #{category}
ORDER BY created_at DESC
